name: Agent Cameraman Skibidi Toilet
description: Hey agent! Quickly grab your weapon and be ready for the mission. The monsters are coming, and their bosses are here too. Eliminate all the restroom monsters! Agent cameraman, if youre ready for the mission, lets begin. Start from the difficulty level you prefer; some missions are harder than others. The monsters can be very powerful. You also need a better weapon to kill the monsters. Get the best weapon and defeat all the restroom monsters. Many costumes are waiting for you as well. Put on the costume you want and start the adventure yourself.
instructions: Use the WASD keys to move Click with the mouse to shoot Mobile joystick controls are available Tap to shoot Mobile playability 10 different missions 10 different difficulties
tags: 2 Player, 2 Player Games, 2D, Action, Adventure, Alien, Android, Arcade, Arena, Interactive, Skibidi, Skibidi Toilet
